title: Property Management: What function does property management...
summary: Describe property management functions including maintenance, security, and administration.
prompt: What function does property management serve in real estate?

options.text: Property management is essential for the daily operation of a property
It has no effect on net income
Measures ability to meet short-term obligations

solution: Property management is essential for the daily operation of a property. It encompasses housekeeping, security, maintenance, and repairs, as well as the administration of the property, including rent collection and expense management. Effective property management ensures the property's value is maintained and operational efficiency is achieved, impacting overall investment returns.
